languages.text: "Вы воистину спаситель Заркова, ниспосланный Императором! Мы вернемся в Клеть и сообщим новости полковнику. Ваша Светлость, ждем вас с триумфом".
"You truly are the saviour of Zarkov sent by the Emperor! We'll go back to the Cage and tell the colonel the news. We'll await your triumphant return, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
languages.original_text: "Вы воистину спаситель Заркова, ниспосланный Императором! Мы вернемся в Клеть и сообщим новости полковнику. Ваша Светлость, ждем вас с триумфом".

"You truly are the saviour of Zarkov sent by the Emperor! We'll go back to the Cage and tell the colonel the news. We'll await your triumphant return, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
"You are truly the saviour of Zarkov sent by the Emperor! We'll go back to Tsar-Cage and tell the colonel the news. We'll await your triumphant return, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: 「皇帝から遣わされたザルコフの救世主、あなたは本当に救世主です！我々はツァー・ケージに戻り、大佐にその知らせを伝えます。あなたの凱旋を待ちます、貴方様」
languages.original_text: "You are truly the saviour of Zarkov sent by the Emperor! We'll go back to Tsar-Cage and tell the colonel the news. We'll await your triumphant return, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: 「皇帝から遣わされたザルコフの救世主、あなたは本当に救世主です！我々はツァー・ケージに戻り、大佐にその知らせを伝えます。あなたの凱旋を待ちます、貴方様。」

languages.text: "Siz gerçekten de Zarkov'un İmparator'un gönderdiği kurtarıcısısınız! Kafes'e dönüp albaya gelişmeleri bildireceğiz. Muzaffer dönüşünüzü bekleyeceğiz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."
languages.original_text: "You truly are the saviour of Zarkov sent by the Emperor! We'll go back to the Cage and tell the colonel the news. We'll await your triumphant return, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: "Siz gerçekten de Zarkov'un İmparator'un gönderdiği kurtarıcısısınız! Kafes'e dönüp albaya gelişmeleri bildireceğiz. Muzaffer dönüşünüzü bekleyeceğiz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."

languages.text: «¡De verdad que el Emperador l{mf|e|a} ha enviado a Zarkov para salvarnos! Volveremos a la Jaula e informaremos al coronel de nuestra victoria. Esperaremos su regreso triunfal, mi{mf|lord|lady}».
languages.original_text: "You truly are the saviour of Zarkov sent by the Emperor! We'll go back to the Cage and tell the colonel the news. We'll await your triumphant return, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: «¡De verdad que el Emperador l{mf|e|a} ha enviado a Zarkov para salvarnos! Volveremos a la Jaula e informaremos al coronel de nuestra victoria. Esperaremos su regreso triunfal, mi{mf|lord|lady}».

languages.text: “您真是帝皇派来拯救扎尔科夫的救星！我们这就返回牢笼，把这个消息告诉上校。我们等您凯旋，大人。”
languages.original_text: "You truly are the saviour of Zarkov sent by the Emperor! We'll go back to the Cage and tell the colonel the news. We'll await your triumphant return, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: “您真是帝皇派来拯救扎尔科夫的救星！我们这就返回牢笼，把这个消息告诉上校。我们等您凯旋，大人。”

languages.text: « Vous êtes réellement {mf|le sauveur|la sauveuse} de Zarkov {mf|envoyé|envoyée} par l'Empereur ! Nous allons retourner à la Cage annoncer la nouvelle au colonel. Nous y attendrons votre retour triomphal, Votre Seigneurie. »
languages.original_text: "You truly are the saviour of Zarkov sent by the Emperor! We'll go back to the Cage and tell the colonel the news. We'll await your triumphant return, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes réellement {mf|le sauveur|la sauveuse} de Zarkov {mf|envoyé|envoyée} par l'Empereur ! Nous allons retourner à la Cage annoncer la nouvelle au colonel. Nous y attendrons votre retour triomphal, Votre Seigneurie. »

languages.text: "Ihr seid wahrlich {mf|der|die} vom Imperator gesandte {mf|Erlöser|Erlöserin} von Zarkov. Wir kehren zum Käfig zurück und informieren den Colonel. Wir werden Eure triumphale Rückkehr erwarten, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."
languages.original_text: "You truly are the saviour of Zarkov sent by the Emperor! We'll go back to the Cage and tell the colonel the news. We'll await your triumphant return, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid wahrlich {mf|der|die} vom Imperator gesandte {mf|Erlöser|Erlöserin} von Zarkov. Wir kehren zum Käfig zurück und informieren den Colonel. Wir werden Eure triumphale Rückkehr erwarten, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."
